pkgmetadata.longdescription: JPHoliday[[image](httpsimg.shields.iopypivjpholiday.svg)](httpspypi.orgprojectjpholiday)[[image](httpsimg.shields.iopypiljpholiday.svg)](httpspypi.orgprojectjpholiday)[[image](httpsimg.shields.iopypipyversionsjpholiday.svg)](httpspypi.orgprojectjpholiday)[[image](httpsimg.shields.iogithubcontributorslalcsjpholiday.svg)](httpsgithub.comlalcsjpholidaygraphscontributors)[[image](httpsimg.shields.iopypidmjpholiday)](httpspypistats.orgpackagesjpholiday)[Unittest](httpsgithub.comLalcsjpholidayworkflowsUnittestbadge.svg) Installationbashpip install jpholiday Sample Code pythonimport jpholidayimport datetime datetime.datejpholiday.is_holiday_name(datetime.date(2017, 1, 1)) jpholiday.is_holiday_name(datetime.date(2017, 1, 2)) jpholiday.is_holiday_name(datetime.date(2017, 1, 3)) None datetime.datetimejpholiday.is_holiday_name(datetime.datetime(2017, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1)) jpholiday.is_holiday_name(datetime.datetime(2017, 1, 2, 1, 1, 1)) jpholiday.is_holiday_name(datetime.datetime(2017, 1, 3, 1, 1, 1)) None pythonimport jpholidayimport datetime datetime.datejpholiday.is_holiday(datetime.date(2017, 1, 1)) Truejpholiday.is_holiday(datetime.date(2017, 1, 2)) Truejpholiday.is_holiday(datetime.date(2017, 1, 3)) False datetime.datetimejpholiday.is_holiday(datetime.datetime(2017, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1)) Truejpholiday.is_holiday(datetime.datetime(2017, 1, 2, 1, 1, 1)) Truejpholiday.is_holiday(datetime.datetime(2017, 1, 3, 1, 1, 1)) False pythonimport jpholidayjpholiday.year_holidays(2017)[(datetime.date(2017, 1, 1), ), (datetime.date(2017, 1, 2), ), (datetime.date(2017, 1, 9), ), (datetime.date(2017, 2, 11), ), (datetime.date(2017, 3, 20), ), (datetime.date(2017, 4, 29), ), (datetime.date(2017, 5, 3), ), (datetime.date(2017, 5, 4), ), (datetime.date(2017, 5, 5), ), (datetime.date(2017, 7, 17), ), (datetime.date(2017, 8, 11), ), (datetime.date(2017, 9, 18), ), (datetime.date(2017, 9, 23), ), (datetime.date(2017, 10, 9), ), (datetime.date(2017, 11, 3), ), (datetime.date(2017, 11, 23), ), (datetime.date(2017, 12, 23), )] pythonimport jpholidayjpholiday.month_holidays(2017, 5)[(datetime.date(2017, 5, 3), ), (datetime.date(2017, 5, 4), ), (datetime.date(2017, 5, 5), )] pythonimport jpholidayimport datetime datetime.datejpholiday.between(datetime.date(2017, 1, 1), datetime.date(2017, 5, 3))[(datetime.date(2017, 1, 1), ), (datetime.date(2017, 1, 2), ), (datetime.date(2017, 1, 9), ), (datetime.date(2017, 2, 11), ), (datetime.date(2017, 3, 20), ), (datetime.date(2017, 4, 29), ), (datetime.date(2017, 5, 3), )] datetime.datetimejpholiday.between(datetime.datetime(2017, 1, 1, 3, 15, 0), datetime.datetime(2017, 5, 3, 12, 30, 12))[(datetime.date(2017, 1, 1), ), (datetime.date(2017, 1, 2), ), (datetime.date(2017, 1, 9), ), (datetime.date(2017, 2, 11), ), (datetime.date(2017, 3, 20), ), (datetime.date(2017, 4, 29), ), (datetime.date(2017, 5, 3), )] pythonimport jpholidayimport datetimeclass TestHoliday(jpholiday.OriginalHoliday) def _is_holiday(self, date) if date datetime.date(2020, 2, 9) return True return False def _is_holiday_name(self, date) return jpholiday.is_holiday_name(datetime.date(2020, 2, 9)) jpholiday.is_holiday(datetime.date(2020, 2, 9)) True pythonimport jpholidayimport datetimejpholiday.OriginalHoliday.unregister(TestHoliday) Example pythonimport jpholidayimport configparserclass TestHoliday(jpholiday.OriginalHoliday) original_holidays {} config configparser.ConfigParser() config.read(holidays.ini) if HOLIDAYS in config original_holidays config[HOLIDAYS] def _is_holiday(self, date) if date in [datetime.strptime(holiday,Y-m-d).date() for holiday in self.original_holidays.keys()] return True return False def _is_holiday_name(self, date) if date.strftime(Y-m-d) in self.original_holidays.keys() return self.original_holidays[date.strftime(Y-m-d)] else return Noneholidays.ini[HOLIDAYS]2021-02-22 12021-02-24 2jpholiday.is_holiday(datetime.date(2021, 2, 22)) Truejpholiday.is_holiday_name(datetime.date(2021, 2, 22)) 1
